hardening_notes: Sprint is hardened and may proceed to Stage 3. Key facts for Cursor: (1) Gap is in exactly 2 files: orchestrator.py:1254 (no runtime_context passed) and orchestrator_phases_v1.py:131 (no runtime_context param). (2) signal_evaluator.py and runtime_context_evaluator.py are already correct — do not touch. (3) All 9 packages with runtime_context_requirements are inactive; threading change will not suppress any active signal. (4) Raw questionnaire_data is the only available context source at Step 1.6 — do not use lifestyle_factors or medical_history. (5) ARCH-ORCH-RESTRUCTURE-1 carry-forward is mandatory. HIGH risk route: Cursor implementation → Claude audit → GPT architectural review → merge only after explicit approval.
